config.rationale: Testing SGLang with NEXTN speculative decoding using the model's built-in MTP layers. This leverages the has_mtp=true capability to potentially improve throughput without needing an external draft model. Configuration includes prefix caching and chunked prefill for optimal performance.

llm_commentary: The latest SGLang experiment with NEXTN speculative decoding failed to produce any results, continuing a pattern of SGLang failures in this search. VLLM remains dominant across all optimization goals with two strong configurations on the Pareto front. The search should focus on VLLM configurations to potentially improve upon the current best throughput of 3023.4 tokens/sec.
